steps.title: Complete the definition
steps.content: The sentence defines the reed of a wind instrument as the mouthpiece where sound is made. It is a statement, so it needs normal word order and a period before the next sentence begins.

steps.title: Avoid question wording
steps.content: Choice A uses inverted word order, where is sound made, even though the sentence is not a question. Choice B uses a question mark. Choice D has both the inverted word order and the question mark. The answer is C.
